headline: Many NSE stocks trade below key technical levels after correction
body: Many Indian stocks are trading below key technical levels after a correction, which analysts say could create buying opportunities. Historically, such corrections attract value investors, leading to short-term rebounds in large-cap stocks.

headline: IndiGo shares drop nearly 5% due to higher fuel costs
body: Aviation stocks such as IndiGo dropped nearly 5% due to higher fuel costs and Middle-East tensions. Rising crude prices historically pressure airline margins, which may continue to weigh on aviation stocks.

headline: Bharti Airtel to see Nifty weight increase, Reliance, HDFC Bank face outflows
body: Nifty index rebalancing increased weight for Bharti Airtel while Reliance and HDFC Bank may see passive fund outflows. Short-term demand from ETFs and index funds may support Bharti Airtel's stock.

headline: NSE to introduce Dated Brent crude oil futures contract from Apr 13
body: NSE will introduce Dated Brent crude oil futures starting April 13, expanding commodity derivatives trading. This move is expected to provide Indian refiners and traders better hedging instruments.

headline: Reliance Jio secures new enterprise AI partnerships
body: Despite index outflows, Reliance Jio has secured multiple enterprise partnerships focusing on 6G research and edge computing, strengthening its digital footprint for FY27.

headline: HDFC Bank deposit growth outpaces credit growth in latest quarter
body: HDFC Bank reported superior deposit mobilization over the weekend, improving its crucial credit-deposit ratio and easing regulatory concerns regarding balance sheet liquidity.

headline: Adani Enterprises wins mega highway projects across three states
body: Adani Enterprises emerged as the lowest bidder for multiple highway projects. The order book swells by ₹14,000 crore, significantly boosting its infrastructure revenue pipeline.

headline: Infosys secures mega $1.5 billion AI-transformation deal
body: Infosys has secured a mega $1.5 billion AI-transformation deal from a European banking giant. The multi-year contract revives optimism around IT demand recovery for the upcoming fiscal.

headline: Tata Motors EV sales jump 35% in March, extending market leadership
body: Tata Motors reported a 35% jump in Electric Vehicle sales during March. Expanding the charging network and aggressive pricing strategies are keeping rivals at bay.

headline: Zomato hits all-time high as Blinkit dark store expansion beats Q4 targets
body: Zomato share interest hit an all-time high over the weekend as internal sources revealed Blinkit's dark store expansion successfully exceeded Q4 targets ahead of schedule.
